feedback.text: Video games as a medium have the same level of influence to people as movies, if not more, it's an important art form that needs to be preserved. Imagine if cult classic movies such as Citizen Kane, Pulp Fiction and Scarface was only available for a limited time after which all physical and digital copies combusted and became unplayable. That is what is happening to a lot of modern games, the publisher deciding to "sunset" them, drop support and make them unplayable because it needs to access a server to be playable
